name: Dressler Park
description: Dressler Park is a place to play pickleball in Smith Valley, NV. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Green valley Park
description: Green valley Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernley, NV. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: No fench around courts.  Bench & bleachers for sitting

name: In Town Park
description: In Town Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Fernley, NV. There is 1 outdoor hard court. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The court is free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Whispering River Ranch RV Park
description: Whispering River Ranch RV Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Yerington, NV. There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms. The courts are private.
open_play_schedule: The court is open to public right now
